properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 102/18

BARENTS SEASEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS 06TH SEP TO FURTHER NOTICE BY VESSEL R/V HARRIER EXPLORER 
TOWING STREAMERS 6,5 NM IN LENGTH WITHIN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.72-41.6N 035-36.0E
B.73-15.2N 015-08.5E
C.69-54.6N 014-53.8E
D.71-46,4N 030-17.4E

GUARD VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE: M/V MERIDIAN
VHF WORKING CH 16 AND 67    
WIDE BERTH WITH MINIMUM 2 NM AHEAD AND 10NM ASTERN REQUESTED
